description: ONDEWO Voip Telephone System Integration (VTSI) Client library for Typescript

scripts.build:test:auth: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.build:test:examples: tsc examples/listVtsiProjects.ts examples/listVtsiProjects.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.pretest: npm run build:test:auth && npm run build:test:examples && npm run typecheck:examples
